error_signature: null value inserted into datetime field
title: Null value in datetime field when using $now
symptom: Inserting the current datetime using `{{ $now.toISO() }}` results in a null value being inserted into the datetime field.
applies_when: Current datetime is being inserted with $now
not_this_if: Timezone is properly set in workflow settings
root_cause: The error occurs because the default timezone for the workflow is not set correctly. Without a proper timezone, the $now function cannot generate a valid datetime, leading to null values being inserted.
fix_steps: Set the default timezone to the desired value
Re-run the workflow with the updated settings
agent_instruction: Set the default timezone in the workflow settings and re-run the workflow.
